summary: Indinavir has no proven effectiveness in treating amyotrophic lateral sclerosis; it is solely indicated as an anti-HIV medication without any supported benefits for ALS symptoms or disease course. All available medical literature shows no connection between indinavir and improvements in ALS outcomes, including pathological mechanisms or patient prognosis.
